mapper.sql: select bpi.block, bpi.zone, bpi.zone_sub, bfi.floor_name, bpld.create_time, bp.id as patrol_id, bpl.id as patrol_log_id, bpld.complete_flag, bpl.start_time, bp.route_id, bp.patrol_number, bp.wait_time, bp.tolerant_time, tbpi.ter_sn, ti.gateway from building_patrol_log bpl left join sys_user su on (bpl.user_id = su.user_id and bpl.complete_flag = '0') left join sys_staff ss on (ss.user_id = su.user_id) left join building_patrol bp on (bpl.route_id = bp.route_id) left join building_patrol_log_detail bpld on (bp.id = bpld.patrol_id and bpld.patrol_log_id = bpl.id) left join building_point_info bpi on (bpi.id = bp.point_id) left join building_floor_info bfi on (bpi.floor_id = bfi.id) left join ter_building_point_info tbpi on (bpi.id = tbpi.point_id) left join ter_info ti on (tbpi.ter_sn = ti.sn)
mapper.insert:
insert into building_patrol_log_detail
id, patrol_log_id, patrol_id, create_time, complete_flag,
#{id}, #{patrolLogId}, #{patrolId}, #{createTime}, #{completeFlag},
